nasb.text: Jehoiachin was eight years old when he became king, and he reigned three months and ten days in Jerusalem, and he did evil in the sight of the Lord.

esv.text: Jehoiachin was eighteen years old when he became king, and he reigned three months and ten days in Jerusalem. He did what was evil in the sight of the Lord.

cnv.text: 約雅斤登基的時候，是八歲；他在耶路撒冷作王共三個月零十天，行耶和華看為惡的事。

ccb.text: 约雅斤十八岁登基，在耶路撒冷执政三个月零十天。他做耶和华视为恶的事。
